zh.lifeSummary: Janet Duddingston是Stephan Duddingston 3rd of Sandford的女兒，於1467年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾桑德福德。她於1485年5月18日與Sir David Bethune在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1541年在蘇格蘭培爾皮特洛賀利享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Janet Duddingston是Stephan Duddingston 3rd of Sandford的女儿，于1467年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾桑德福德。她于1485年5月18日与Sir David Bethune在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1541年在苏格兰培爾皮特洛賀利享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Duddingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Doddington
meanings: English: locative name from any of several places called Doddington (Cambs, Kent, Lincs, Cheshire, Northumb) or Dodington (Gloucs, Somerset, Shrops), or from Dry Doddington (Lincs), Great Doddington (Northants). In addition, Dunton (Bucks), Denton (Northants), Derrington (Staffs), and Detton Hall (Shrops) all appear in Domesday Book as Dodintone, and may have contributed to the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Janet Duddingston was born in 1467, in Sandford, Lanarkshire, Scotland as the daughter of Stephan Duddingston 3rd of Sandford. She married Sir David Bethune on 18 May 1485, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1541, in Pitlochry, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Janet Duddingston est née en 1467, à Sandford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, fille de Stephan Duddingston 3rd of Sandford. Elle a épousé Sir David Bethune le 18 mai 1485, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1541, à Pitlochry, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Duddingstonは1467年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアサンドフォードでStephan Duddingston 3rd of Sandfordの娘として生まれた。1485年5月18日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでSir David Bethuneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1541年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアピトロチリーで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Duddingston(은)는 1467년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 샌드퍼드에서 Stephan Duddingston 3rd of Sandford의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1485년 5월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Sir David Bethune(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1541년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 피틀럭리에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Janet Duddingston родилась в 1467 г. в местности сэндфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия. Её отца звали Stephan Duddingston 3rd of Sandford. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir David Bethune 18 мая 1485 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1541 г. в местности питлочри, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет.
